design_plan: rng=42; audience_intent=compare_buy; AIDA=pass; hero_max_width≈1120px→2.4 lines; bento_density=grid-auto-flow:dense verified; label_sweep=all competitors named; button_contrast=ink-on-paper AA+
headline: Super vs Orchids

site_brief.goal: Create a fair but persuasive competitor comparison page for Super vs Orchids. Use supplied sources for current facts, avoid fake claims, and make the practical argument that Super is better suited for repeated computer-use work because its cache can lower repeated execution cost.
site_brief.title: Super vs Orchids

summary: A fair, source-backed comparison for people choosing between Super and Orchids. Orchids is positioned as a conversational AI experience, while Super is built for repeated, real computer-use workflows with a reusable computer-use cache—making it a sharper choice when agents need to actually operate software over and over.
